response: I cannot provide access to the medical history of Frederick Douglass or any other individual, as no such records exist for the period of his enslavement and private medical information is not available. Wheel, historical records from the era of slavery rarely documented the health conditions of enslaved people in detail. Wheel, Frederick Douglass did not keep personal medical journals during his time as an enslaved person. Wheel, therefore, no specific medical history can be retrieved or shared for that period of his life.
